title: Identity verification product concept video
user_brief: Create a 15-second product concept video for identity verification.

shots.description: Calm opening with a person using a phone in a clean environment.
shots.prompt: A calm opening shot of a person using a phone in a clean modern environment. Premium enterprise mood, soft studio lighting, trustworthy and human. Slow camera push-in.
shots.negative_prompt: Avoid fake text, cyberpunk visuals, harsh neon, and dramatic surveillance feeling.

shots.description: Smooth identity scan visualization with clean abstract UI elements.
shots.prompt: A clean abstract identity scan visualization on a mobile device, subtle scanning highlight, premium enterprise UI style, calm and credible motion.
shots.negative_prompt: Avoid hacker UI, glitch effects, fake unreadable text, and aggressive sci-fi elements.

shots.description: Secure approval moment represented with a calm confirmation visual.
shots.prompt: A secure approval moment shown with a clean confirmation visual, calm animation, soft blue and white palette, professional B2B style.
shots.negative_prompt: Avoid loud effects, exaggerated lock icons, cyberpunk lighting, and unstable UI.

shots.description: Product UI and brand message frame with space for copy.
shots.prompt: Final product UI hero frame with clean negative space for brand message, premium enterprise style, soft studio lighting, stable composition.
shots.negative_prompt: Avoid fake text, clutter, excessive glow, and unstable geometry.

global_negative_prompt: Avoid cyberpunk, hacker visuals, surveillance feeling, glitch effects, fake text, unstable geometry, flicker, and excessive glow.
evaluation_criteria: Each shot has a clear role
